issue_title: Changing language to another does not work.
issue_body_preview:
### Requirements

- [X] I checked the troubleshooting section in the README to verify that I have the latest TrashCard version.
- [X] I did a search to see if there is a similar issue or if a pull request is open.

### Current Behavior

I change language in the current users General settings to anot
test_description_zh: 在 Home Assistant 中添加或编辑 Trash Card 卡片，进入用户设置将界面语言切换为非默认语言（如德语、法语等），然后返回查看 Trash Card 的显示内容，观察卡片上的文本标签、日期描述等是否跟随所选语言进行了本地化显示。
expected_result_zh: 切换语言后，Trash Card 上的所有文本（如垃圾收集提示、日期描述、标签等）应正确显示为用户所选语言的本地化内容，而非停留在默认语言或英语。
